summary: Frontend verification of new packaging waste section inside Waste Efficiency Report tab on Branch Orders page. All required data-testids render with the correct seeded data; branch filter correctly re-fetches and preserves the packaging row.

issues: When the main (non-packaging) report has 0 rows, summary cards still show '0 IQD' and 0% which is fine, but the empty-state card sits between summary and packaging section creating a large vertical gap. Consider compressing height of empty-state when packaging section exists. Minor cosmetic.

critical_code_review_comments: WasteEfficiencyReport.js (349 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold but still acceptable. Packaging section is cleanly separated and reads from data.packaging_rows / data.packaging_summary as expected.
Empty packaging_rows / packaging_summary defaults are correctly handled in fetchReport catch block and initial state.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded packaging loss (material 'علبة برغر اختبار', loss_qty 15, loss_value 3750, business_date 2026-06-01).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packaging waste section inside Waste Efficiency Report is fully working. Verified data-testid='packaging-waste-section', 'packaging-waste-table', 'packaging-total-loss' all render with correct values (15 قطعة, 3,750 IQD for 'علبة برغر اختبار'). Branch filter switching to 'الفرع الرئيسي' keeps the row and re-fetches /api/reports/branch-waste-efficiency successfully. No further work needed on this feature.
